posts.author: volunike (Aviv)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

There are some integrations in the marketplace that I would like to develop and offer for free.

Is there a policy prohibiting developers from publishing existing integrations?

Those integrations hadn’t been developed by Monday.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @volunike and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

monday.com does not have any policies prohibiting this.

Cheers,
Matias
